Component.name: What kind of test is this?

Script.name: What kind of test is this?
Script.parameter: whatToTest = "connector"; // connector, init or event, last two Form scripts

Script.name: Kafka params
SpoofLib
Connector Script
Pre_Test for Claude
Test Connector functions
DumpWorkEntry
DumpWorkEntry
DumpWorkEntry

Configuration.parameter: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><MetamergeConfig Cycle="7" UUID="ae353aa2-d1d6-4714-9f48-9cdc6f357dd6" created="Tue Apr 21 11:19:03 CEST 2026" createdBy="eddiehartman" main="Form" modified="Tue Apr 21 11:55:36 CEST 2026" modifiedBy="eddiehartman" version="7.1.1"> <Form name="Form"> <ModTime>1776765336009</ModTime> <FormItemNames> <ListItem>$GLOBAL.script</ListItem> <ListItem>keepGlobalState</ListItem> <ListItem>$GLOBAL.includeFiles</ListItem> <ListItem>includePrologs</ListItem> <ListItem>$GLOBAL.debug</ListItem> <ListItem>$GLOBAL.help</ListItem> <ListItem>connector_mode</ListItem> <ListItem>bootstrap_servers</ListItem> <ListItem>topic</ListItem> <ListItem>group_id</ListItem> <ListItem>client_id</ListItem> <ListItem>auto_offset_reset</ListItem> <ListItem>poll_timeout_ms</ListItem> <ListItem>max_poll_records</ListItem> <ListItem>acks</ListItem> <ListItem>key_attribute</ListItem> <ListItem>start_offset</ListItem> </FormItemNames> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>General</ListItem> <ListItem>Advanced</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <FormItem name="acks"> <ModTime>1776764682579</ModTime> <Values> <ListItem>0</ListItem> <ListItem>1</ListItem> <ListItem>all</ListItem> </Values> <parameter name="description">Durability guarantee for produced messages. 0:fire and forget, 1:leader broker only, all:full in-sync replica set</parameter> <parameter name="label">Producer Acknowledgement</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">droplist</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="auto_offset_reset"> <ModTime>1776764682579</ModTime> <Values> <ListItem>earliest</ListItem> <ListItem>latest</ListItem> </Values> <parameter name="description">Where to start consuming when no committed offset exists and Start Offset is blank</parameter> <parameter name="label">Auto Offset Reset</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">droplist</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="bootstrap_servers"> <ModTime>1776765336009</ModTime> <parameter name="Required">true</parameter> <parameter name="description">Kafka broker address(es), e.g. host:port, host:port, ...</parameter> <parameter name="label">Bootstrap Servers</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">string</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="client_id"> <ModTime>1776763898222</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Human-readable name for this connector's Kafka client</parameter> <parameter name="label">Client ID</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="connector_mode"> <ModTime>1776764682556</ModTime> <Values> <ListItem>client</ListItem> <ListItem>admin</ListItem> </Values> <parameter name="Required">true</parameter> <parameter name="description">Either Client (producer/consumer) or Admin (cluster operations)</parameter> <parameter name="label">Connector Mode</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">droplist</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="group_id"> <ModTime>1776764569502</ModTime> <parameter name="Required">true</parameter> <parameter name="description">Identifies this consumer within a Kafka consumer group</parameter> <parameter name="label">Consumer Group ID</parameter> <parameter name="modes">Iterator</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="includePrologs"> <parameter name="description">pro_desc</parameter> <parameter name="label">pro_label</parameter> <parameter name="script">selectGlobalProlog</parameter> <parameter name="scriptLabel">pro_script_label</parameter> <parameter name="scripthelp">pro_script_help</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">textarea</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="keepGlobalState"> <parameter name="description">SCRIPT_CONN_KEEP_GLOBAL_STATE_DESC</parameter> <parameter name="label">SCRIPT_CONN_KEEP_GLOBAL_STATE_LABEL</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">boolean</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="key_attribute"> <ModTime>1776764267804</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Output mapped attribute to use as the Kafka message key</parameter> <parameter name="label">Message Key Attribute</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="max_poll_records"> <ModTime>1776764099481</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Maximum messages returned per poll call</parameter> <parameter name="label">Max Poll Records</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="poll_timeout_ms"> <ModTime>1776764076497</ModTime> <parameter name="description">How long to block waiting for messages per poll cycle</parameter> <parameter name="label">Poll Timeout (ms)</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="start_offset"> <ModTime>1776764300803</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Optional. Force all partitions to start at this offset</parameter> <parameter name="label">Start Offset</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="topic"> <ModTime>1776764556404</ModTime> <parameter name="Required">true</parameter> <parameter name="description">Kafka topic to read from or write to</parameter> <parameter name="label">Topic</parameter> <parameter name="modes">Iterator, AddOnly</parameter> </FormItem> <FormSection name="Advanced"> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>start_offset</ListItem> <ListItem>poll_timeout_ms</ListItem> <ListItem>max_poll_records</ListItem> <ListItem>client_id</ListItem> <ListItem>$GLOBAL.userComment</ListItem> <ListItem>$GLOBAL.script</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <parameter name="initiallyExpanded">false</parameter> <parameter name="title">Advanced</parameter> </FormSection> <FormSection name="General"> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>connector_mode</ListItem> <ListItem>bootstrap_servers</ListItem> <ListItem>topic</ListItem> <ListItem>group_id</ListItem> <ListItem>auto_offset_reset</ListItem> <ListItem>acks</ListItem> <ListItem>key_attribute</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> </FormSection> <parameter name="title">CONN_TITLE</parameter> <TranslationFile>NLS/idi_conn_scriptconn</TranslationFile> </Form> </MetamergeConfig>

Connector.name: KafkaConnector 20260423 1205 Iterator, Lookup and AddOnly working

start consuming when no committed offset exists and Start Offset is blank</parameter> <parameter name="label">Auto Offset Reset</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">droplist</parameter> </FormItem> ...</parameter> <parameter name="label">Bootstrap Servers</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">string</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="client_id"> <ModTime>1776867664853</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Optional human-readable name for this connector's Kafka client. Leave back for default (0)</parameter> <parameter name="label">Partition</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="poll_timeout_ms"> <ModTime>1776764076497</ModTime> <parameter name="description">How long to block waiting for messages per poll cycle</parameter> <parameter name="label">Poll Timeout (ms)</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="start_offset"> <ModTime>1776764300803</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Optional.
